data.body: Kickoff. Executing epic 2fd4 (brilliant-curly-songbird): asymmetric attestation foundation. Tree: 5 task children, depth 1. Stack/dep order: 9fd5 (DSSE PAE, foundational) -> 518b (scheme registry+verify-dispatch) -> {56d9 SSHSIG, 7e53 HMAC-legacy} -> f25e (ADR+docs, non-code leaf). Landing: Gerrit stacked changes (refs/for/main), rebar-ticket trailer + DCO signoff. Both gates ON: plan-review claim gate + completion-verification close gate. Worktree: /Users/joeoakhart/rebar-attest-foundation branch impl/attest-foundation from origin/main@2d1524ad8. Commit-msg + pre-commit hooks present, agents extra + ANTHROPIC_API_KEY confirmed.
